_publications._publicationTitle: The haploinsufficient hematopoietic microenvironment is critical to the pathological fracture repair in murine models of neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: At 24 weeks of age, Nf1+/− tibiae showed a 13% reduction in BMD as compared to WT control mice
details: Showed 13% reduction in tibial BMD at 24 weeks compared to WT control mice
